1010101110111100111111101001000011001000100010010101100000001 - ASI: 26

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0011 = 00 * 11
  0100 = 01 * 00
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00100 = 0 * 0100
  101011 = 1010 * 11
  101111 = 10 * 1111
  00000001 = 0000 * 0001
  00111111 = 0011 * 1111
  01000100 = 0100 * 0100
  10100100 = 1010 * 0100
  10101011 = 10 * 101011
  001100100 = 0011 * 00100
  10101011101111 = 10101011 * 101111
  10101100000001 = 101011 * 00000001
  0011111110100100 = 00111111 * 10100100
  00110010001000100 = 001100100 * 01000100
  101010111011110011111110100100 = 10101011101111 * 0011111110100100
  0011001000100010010101100000001 = 00110010001000100 * 10101100000001
  1010101110111100111111101001000011001000100010010101100000001 = 101010111011110011111110100100 * 0011001000100010010101100000001
